title: Values should not be uselessly incremented
description: Values should not be uselessly incrementedAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugunusedWhy is this an issue?A value that is incremented or decremented and then not stored is at best wasted code and at worst a bug.Noncompliant code exampleint pickNumber() { int i = 0; int j = 0; i = i++; // Noncompliant; i is still zero return j++; // Noncompliant; 0 returned }Compliant solutionint pickNumber() { int i = 0; int j = 0; i++; return ++j; }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Values should not be uselessly incremented. Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
